backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Motoko backend defining CRUD operations for episodes, characters, content, and contact requests, with admin-only access control enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding a default `displayOrder` field to all existing Character records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence implementation of drag-and-drop character reordering in AdminCharactersPanel, referencing the relevant frontend files and test ID REQ-2.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that sets the page title to "Whispers of the White Moon" and mounts the React app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/RUN-LOCAL-AND-DEPLOY-IC.md: Step-by-step guide for running the project locally and deploying it to the Internet Computer mainnet, including prerequisites, commands, and a deployment verification checklist.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders the AdminDashboard at `/admin` or the full public-facing site with all section components, wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Simple section component that renders the anime series synopsis from `animeSiteConfig` with a section header and readable typography.
frontend/src/components/AdminCharactersP: Admin panel component for managing characters that implements HTML5 drag-and-drop reordering with optimistic UI updates, persisting the new order to the backend via the `useReorderCharacters` mutation, alongside create, edit, and delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminContactRequ: Admin panel component for viewing, filtering, updating status, deleting, and exporting contact requests as CSV. Uses React Query hooks and displays requests with topic labels, timestamps, and processed/pending badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminContentPane: Admin panel for managing content entries, supporting list view with add, edit, and delete operations. Delegates to ContentForm for create/edit and uses React Query hooks for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Top-level admin dashboard component handling Internet Identity authentication, admin role verification, and section routing via a sidebar. Renders different admin panels (episodes, characters, content, contacts, roles) based on the active section.
frontend/src/components/AdminEpisodesPan: Admin panel for managing episodes with list, add, edit, and delete functionality, sorted by season and episode number. Delegates to EpisodeForm for create/edit and uses React Query hooks for data operations.
frontend/src/components/AdminRolePanel.t: Admin panel for role management that displays the current user's principal ID and allows granting admin roles to other users by principal ID. Uses the grantAdminRole mutation hook and provides copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminSection.tsx: Admin panel component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, displays and filters contact requests, allows toggling request status, granting admin roles, and exporting requests as CSV.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component for the admin dashboard with links to Episodes, Characters, Content, Contact Requests, and Role Management sections, supporting both desktop and mobile (overlay) layouts.
frontend/src/components/CharacterForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing a character, using react-hook-form with fields for name, role, bio, image URL, weapon, power, and traits, wired to create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchQu: Multi-step quiz component with 7 personality questions that collects trait-tagged answers and computes a character match score against the anime site's character roster.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchRe: Displays the quiz result showing the matched character's details (image, bio, weapon, personality, power state) along with a match percentage progress bar and a restart button.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchSe: Section wrapper that manages quiz state (not-started, in-progress, completed) and renders the intro prompt, CharacterMatchQuiz, or CharacterMatchResult accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CharactersSectio: Displays a paginated grid of character cards fetched from the API, showing image, name, role, bio, weapon, power, and traits, with loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/ClansSection.tsx: Renders a static grid of seven clan cards, each with a sigil image, name, and description describing their elemental powers.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Provides a contact form with email, topic, and message fields, validates input, and submits via a mutation hook with toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ContentForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing content entries (announcements, lore, news, etc.) using react-hook-form, with fields for type, title, body, and image URL.
frontend/src/components/ContentSection.t: Fetches and displays a grid of news/update content cards with badge-labeled types, optional images, and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/EpisodeForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing episode entries with fields for title, description, video URL, thumbnail URL, season number, and episode number using react-hook-form.
Displays a sorted list of episodes fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons and error states, allowing users to click an episode to select it and scroll to the video section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright, a YouTube channel link, and a Cash App donation handle.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, anime title, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the About and Characters sections.
frontend/src/components/IntroSection.tsx: Renders an introduction section with an embedded or direct video player (with a fallback external link), plus the anime tagline and a synopsis excerpt.
frontend/src/components/RewardsSection.t: Displays a donations section with a Cash App handle and a list of tiered donation reward levels pulled from the site config.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Simple reusable component that renders a centered section title with a decorative accent underline.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to all page sections, a mobile hamburger menu, and a conditional admin dashboard link for authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Renders a video player section that displays the selected episode's video (direct file or embedded iframe) along with its title, season/episode info, and description.
frontend/src/components/WorldbuildingSec: React component that renders the Worldbuilding section of the anime site, displaying clans, clan eye rules, power system, rank system, and the Shiranagi family using data from animeSiteConfig.
frontend/src/content/animeSiteConfig.ts: Central configuration object for the 'Whispers of the White Moon' anime site, containing all static content including synopsis, CTA buttons, reward tiers, and worldbuilding data (clans, power system, rank system).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions, including admin checks, user profiles, contact requests, episodes, characters, and content CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS setup, light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH colors (manga/ink aesthetic), typography with Noto Serif JP and Inter fonts, and a scoped admin dashboard dark theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeIntroEmbedUr: Utility function that converts YouTube and Vimeo share URLs into embed-friendly iframe URLs, leaving direct video file URLs unchanged.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID with a configurable pixel offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, fonts (Inter, Noto Serif JP), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Whispers of the White Moon' describing existing features (drag-and-drop character reordering in AdminCharactersPanel) and pending feature requests (displayOrder backend field and reorder endpoint).
